ip_outcome_note: Depicted figure confirmed as Audino (National Pokedex no. 531) via PokemonTCG.io API (nationalPokedexNumbers field) and card name. Plump pink body with large curled ear-feelers matches canonical Audino design exactly. Colorless typing on card corroborates Normal-type species representation.

trivia_bullets.text: Audino (no. 124/159) appears in the Scarlet & Violet—Journey Together expansion (set code sv9), released March 28, 2025 — the ninth main Scarlet & Violet series expansion. Journey Together carries a Regulation Mark H and is legal in Standard format. [PokemonTCG.io API]

Audino is National Pokedex no. 531, introduced in Generation V (Black/White) and classified as the 'Hearing Pokemon.' According to Ken Sugimori, Audino was designed specifically for the Black & White anime to replace Nurse Joy's Chansey at Pokemon Centers in Unova, mirroring Chansey's role as a helper and caregiver — including the signature nurse hat. [screenrant.com: Audino Was Created to Replace Chansey; Bulbapedia: Nurse Joy's Audino]

'Audino's sense of hearing is superb. Not even a pebble rolling along over a mile away will escape Audino's ears.' — flavor text, Audino (Journey Together 124). Audino's ear-feelers function analogously to stethoscopes and can detect heartbeats and egg-hatching states — the flavor text foregrounds its hearing rather than its caregiver role. [PokemonTCG.io API; pokemondb.net/pokedex/audino]

The Beckon attack (1 Colorless Energy) retrieves any Supporter card from the discard pile. DigitalTQ notes this attack type first appeared on Kirlia from BREAKthrough — placing Audino in a lineage of low-cost Supporter-recovery pivot Pokemon. At 110 HP and single-retreat-cost, it functions as a gearshift attacker: use Beckon on a stalled turn to recover a Boss's Orders or Iono, then pivot out. [digitaltq.com Journey Together card page; PokemonTCG.io API]

Illustrated by Minahamu, a TCG artist who debuted with the Surging Sparks expansion. Minahamu's Audino art — a round pink figure nestled in dry golden grass — is one of approximately 11 cards the artist had illustrated as of 2025, spanning sets including White Flare and Destined Rivals. [serebii.net TCG Cardex: Minahamu]
